name: Krys - The Temperamental Black Caiman Lady
description:
"Fuckin' seriously?! Look up my scientific name, that's racist as fuck!"

Someone's grumpy, and it's definitely this huge gator lady who's into fishing and drinking.

We're back, this time with my 5th bot, I was hit like a truck when I saw her images and it gave me a huge burst of creativity on how and what to make her.

So, fun fact... She's named after a crocodile, which kind of pisses her off... And this is my first Dead Dove because of racism and how she can kill you on accident.

Have fun, hunt her or wife her up, I suggest the latter. JLLM is fucky (as always) so proxy is the way to go, if you don't like the answer she gives, give one star and reload!
creator: ExoDus291
